prompt: this Go module has Inc(n) in mathx.go and Apply(n) in apply.go. Do three things: (1) in mathx.go add an exported function Double(n int) int that returns n*2; (2) rewire Apply in apply.go so it doubles first then increments, i.e. Apply(n) must equal Inc(Double(n)); (3) add a new file apply_test.go with a Go test that verifies Apply(3) == 7. Make `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` both pass. Do not change Inc.
judge: Double added, Apply doubles-then-increments, a real test exists, build and tests pass
